title: [codereview-pass2 P4] coap_dtn.c: missing file header and SenML base_name
description: coap_dtn.c lacks SPDX and doc comment (compare coap_location.c:1-14). deaddrop_get uses NULL base_name in pack_init; per spec/appendix-senml.md and location pattern should include urn:dev:mac:...: for attribution. Add build_base_name helper (even if duplicate for now). discovered-from:project-LICHEN-92oj
